title: TP HOME
description:
set home and go home anytime.
Commands:
/sethome <name>
/deletegame <name>
/sethomelimit <number> //op
/gohome <name>
/listhome
body:
**TP Home - Advanced Home Teleportation System**


A comprehensive home management plugin featuring intelligent cooldown systems, acceleration mechanics, and emergency teleportation options. Set multiple homes, teleport between them, and manage cooldowns with an intuitive GUI interface.


**Key Features**:
  - Multi-Home System: Create and manage multiple home locations with configurable limits
  - Smart Cooldown Management: Persistent cooldown system that survives server restarts
  - Acceleration System: Reduce cooldowns using in-game items (Ender Pearls, Gold Ingots, Amethyst Shards)
  - Emergency Teleport: Bypass cooldowns instantly using diamonds with temporary debuffs
  - Player Teleportation: Send and accept teleport requests between players
  - Death Recovery: Teleport back to your last death location
  - Interactive GUIs: User-friendly inventory-based menus for all features
  - Teleport Delays: Configurable countdown with movement cancellation
  - Permission Support: Flexible permission system for different player groups
  - Persistent Data: JSON-based storage for homes and cooldowns

  Perfect for survival servers looking to enhance player convenience while maintaining balanced gameplay through cooldown mechanics and resource costs.
